MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUTTER STREET RECREATION CORP. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-21-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 606 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-28-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEPT 606, JUDGE RYAN, G.ESPINOCILLA-CLK, D.COSTELLO-CSR. C/C FOR SETT CONF. ALL PRESENT. A WRITTEN STIP JUDGMENT SIGNED BY ALL SUBMITTED TO COURT. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL VAC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOVE, DOUG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET, #608, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,160.52 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,160.52, STAYED UNTIL MAY-16-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, EBOC & ATNY FEES; S/E TO 3PM 5/16/98; MUTUAL REL FROM ANY & ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THIS TENANCY; ANY PERS PROP LEFT AFTER 5/16/98 WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; IF DEFT VAC BY 3PM 5/16/98, PLTF WILL WAIVE ALL RENT & DAMAGES, INCL $1160.52, & FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
